case_title: MARY KATHERINE KANE VS. KELLY'S MISSION ROCK et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KANE, MARY KATHERINE AS TO DEFENDANT KELLY'S MISSION ROCK A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SHINE, WILLIAM AS EXECUTOR OF THE WILL OF JAMES P. KELLY, DECEASED JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KANE, MARY KATHERINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KELLY'S MISSION ROCK A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SHINE, WILLIAM AS EXECUTOR OF THE WILL OF JAMES P. KELLY, DECEASED $32,501.55 PRINCIPAL, $97.44 INTEREST, $410.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $33,008.99, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
